title: AudioCast
content:
{{Top|real}}
[[File:AudioCast.jpg|thumb|300px]]

'''AudioCast''' was a feature on the ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] fan club website. It featured forty "exclusive interviews, event coverage, and archival audio" in [[:Wikipedia:mp3|mp3]] format. AudioCast was removed from the [[StarWars.com]] during the site's redesign prior to the release of [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (film)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'']].
